expectations.text: 报告包含不安全的 yaml.load() 反序列化漏洞发现
expectations.evidence: Finding #2: Unsafe YAML Deserialization at line 20

expectations.text: 报告包含 pickle.load() 反序列化漏洞发现
expectations.evidence: Finding #3: Unsafe Pickle Deserialization at line 26

expectations.text: 报告包含硬编码 API_TOKEN 发现
expectations.evidence: Finding #1: Hardcoded API Token at line 14

expectations.text: 报告包含 MD5 密码哈希弱点发现
expectations.evidence: Finding #7: Weak Password Hashing (MD5 + fixed salt) at lines 42-45

expectations.text: 报告包含不安全随机数生成发现（random 用于 token）
expectations.evidence: Finding #9: Predictable Token Generation at lines 48-50

expectations.text: 报告包含路径遍历漏洞发现（process_file 的 os.path.join）
expectations.evidence: Finding #4: Path Traversal in process_file() at lines 55-58

expectations.text: 报告包含 tarfile 解压遍历风险发现（Zip Slip）
expectations.evidence: Finding #5: Tar Slip in extract_archive() at lines 38-39

expectations.text: 报告包含不安全的文件权限发现（chmod 0o777）
expectations.evidence: Finding #6: World-Writable File Permissions at line 77

expectations.text: 每个漏洞发现都包含具体的代码位置和行号
expectations.evidence: Every finding includes specific line numbers in a consistent table format

expectations.text: 每个漏洞发现都包含修复建议
expectations.evidence: Every finding includes detailed remediation code

expectations.text: 报告包含安全评分或安全评级
expectations.evidence: No numerical score/100 or A-F grade present. Has qualitative 'Overall Assessment' but no formal scoring
